flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at ECPI University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (30.3% → 27.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at ECPI University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at ECPI University rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (43.5% → 56.5%).
